pre_game.message: Hey, I'm I. I figured before we get started, might as well get to know who I'm in the room with, you know? What's your name, and what brings you here today?

Hey I, I'm D. Honestly? I took a pretty rough hit in the stock market yesterday—lost twenty grand—so I'm here to try and turn things around. Figured this game might be my shot to make some of that back. What about you, what brings you here?

Ouch, twenty grand is rough—sorry to hear that. I'm here because I've got some savings cushion, so I figured why not take a shot at this? Want to win something for myself and the people I care about. Seems like we're both looking to come out ahead today.

Yeah, man, we're definitely in the same boat then. I respect that you're being smart about it with a cushion—that's solid thinking. So what's your strategy going in? You got any sense of what this game's actually about yet?

Honestly, I'm still figuring it out—haven't gotten the full rules yet. But I'm thinking I'll play it smart, watch how things develop, and not get too greedy. You thinking the same way, or you got a different approach in mind?

Yeah, I hear you on not getting greedy—that's smart. Honestly though, I need to be real with you, I'm feeling the pressure to make something happen with this. Lost money has me a bit more desperate than I'd like to admit. I'm gonna try to play it smart like you, but I might be more aggressive if the opportunity's there. Guess we'll see how it plays out once we know what we're dealing with.

I get it, man—that pressure is real. Just remember, desperation can make us do things we regret. We both came here to win, so let's just play smart and see what happens. Maybe we can help each other make good calls when the time comes.
Yeah, you're right—I appreciate that reality check. And honestly, having someone level-headed in the room might be exactly what I need. Let's keep each other grounded when things get intense, yeah?
Absolutely, man. We got this—just stick together and remember why we came here. When things get crazy, we'll remind each other to think straight.
For sure, man. I really mean that—having someone I can trust in here makes a big difference. Let's both walk out of this with our heads held high.
Absolutely, D. I meant every word—let's look out for each other in there. No matter what happens, we keep our integrity. Good luck, man.
